text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff Tachyon... really is fast.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... Cough!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine... Sorry for making you worry. It looks
like... I've reached my limit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I have no doubt... She was there... ahead of
Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Right now, Tachyon is the closest to my friend. I
have no choice... but to go after her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll make my contest with her... my guidepost...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown tour and Manhattan
Cafe's goal to chase after her friend align
perfectly. If she can keep on chasing after Agnes
Tachyon into the future...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, heh heh heh! Now I see, Cafe! This is who you are!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is good! This is good! You've got no chance, but it's good! The failure I anticipated is at odds with unforeseen success!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And rightly so. The world runs on the process of
elimination, you know. Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon gleefully laughs to herself for a
little while, then looks to the sky and whispers
something.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Tachyons—the hypothetical particles believed to
move faster than light.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But even if they are hypothetical, I should make a
demonstration ...of the afterimage borne of
madness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho. I have no doubt that glittering
embers will emerge once the inferno abates.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to chase after Tachyon, I think my
next race should be the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking we would go straight for the Triple
Crown tour, but I should step back and think this
through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon seemed fearless this afternoon.
And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... Cough! Ugh...
choice_data_list:
Don't you think today's race was pretty hard on
you?

Don't you think today's race was pretty hard on
you?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Y-yes... A little...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's race has taken its toll on her frail
constitution. Even if our goal is clear now, setting
our sights on a G1 race anytime soon is out of the
question.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What about... the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might be onto something. The Japanese
Derby is a race I'd like to see Manhattan Cafe
win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, if we made that our goal, we'd have to take
a pretty high-stakes gamble on whether we could
pull it off...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry. All I do is mess up...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I shouldn't be taking advantage... of your kindness... Not at a time like this. Cough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Let's calm down for a moment and think about
this. If we're going for steady success...
choice_data_list: Let's enter the St. Lite Kinen in the fall.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
In the fall... The preliminary to the Kikuka Sho...
That's so far away...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But we should... at least try the Derby...
choice_data_list:
We can consider it while we're monitoring your
condition.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My condition...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay. But if I can recover in time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, the St. Lite Kinen is our goal, and we'll
enter the Japanese Derby if we can. As her
trainer, this is the best road map I can offer.
